title: TJX: Upside Is Limited
text: TJX Companies continues to perform well in a difficult environment and is well positioned for long-term growth. Compared to peers, TJX's higher income customer base is less susceptible to inflationary headwinds which has led to stronger same-store sales and margins.

title: TJ Maxx cuts Yeezy-branded merchanise amid Kanye West fallout
text: The list of companies cutting ties with artist and designer Ye following a series of antisemitic remarks continues to grow, with TJ Maxx boycotting the apparel line, the retailer announced Wednesday.

title: Why TJX's Upswing is Too Good to Pass Up
text: The shares of TJX Companies Inc (NYSE:TJX) broke out of a downtrend from August through October, and are currently above all daily and weekly trendlines.

title: 7 Undervalued Retail Stocks to Buy Now
text: The retail sector has suffered outsized losses relative to the broader market in 2022 as consumers have reined in spending amid an economic downturn and possible recession. Year to date, SPDR S&P Retail ETF (NYSEARCA: XRT ) is down 36% compared to a 21% decline in the S&P 500.

title: Got $1000? Here Are 3 Stocks to Buy
text: Investors should think bigger picture, but at the same time, think about each company's unique situation.

title: Why TJ Maxx can offer discounted merchandise

title: An Updated View On The TJX Companies
text: Declining sales and contracting margins caused by elevated commodity prices and low consumer confidence in the second quarter. The unfavorable FX environment has also created headwinds for TJX's business.
